creator: guyyur@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 152458
ip6(4) update from OpenBSD

ip6(4) is missing IPV6_RECVHOPLIMIT and other RFC3542 API documentation.

OpenBSD has updated ip6(4) for RFC3542.

Attached patch applies OpenBSD revisions 1.25, 1.26, 1.29, 1.31, 1.32, 1.33.
$OpenBSD$ line is updated from 1.21 to 1.33.

Revision 1.25 adds missing sys/types.h.
The other revisions update RFC APIs and Standards.

Skipped OpenBSD revisions:
1.22 conversion of date to $Mdocdate$ keyword.
1.23 already done by r196654.
1.24 already done by r176470.
1.27 and 1.28 adding IPV6_RECVDSTPORT.
  (there is no reference to IPV6_RECVDSTPORT in sys/netinet6)
1.30 already done by r274331.

Manpage date is not updated by the patch.
